Title: Relates to authorizing a reduction of taxes pursuant to shelter rent
Summary: Relates to authorizing a reduction of taxes pursuant to shelter rent; provides that upon consent of the local legislative body in a city with a population of one million or more such taxes may be reduced to five per centum or less, including a full reduction of the annual shelter rent or carrying charges of a project.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the private housing finance law, in relation to authorizing a reduction of taxes pursuant to shelter rent
